mainQuestTheme: Directing raw life force without leaking it through impulse, proving, over-supporting, or overextension.

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The energy is rising, but it has nowhere real to go yet.

questBrief.mission: Hold your energy instead of discharging it into random movement.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice where your energy is rising without a target.
questBrief.livePrompt: What are you about to act on just to release pressure?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This is raw, physical power building inside the system. The pressure to act increases, but the direction is not yet aligned with anything meaningful. The work is containment before expression.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: If you move too early, you waste the force. If you hold it, power starts becoming precision.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You move just to get rid of the feeling.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you acting just to feel relief?

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body holds power without needing to discharge it.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your body hold the energy without spending it?

unlockCondition.questKey: Feel the surge → refuse immediate action → move only when direction is clear
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels strong without urgency.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Pause one full breath before acting on the first surge.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Power is not proven by movement.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Let the energy build instead of leak.

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: The movement is already correct until you interfere.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: Power moves cleanly on its own.
questBrief.mission: Follow natural movement without adding force.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice what is already moving without effort.
questBrief.livePrompt: Where are you adding effort to something that works?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: Power here moves efficiently when it is not over-managed. The body already knows the clean line of action, but the mind may try to improve, control, or prove what is already working.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Extra effort breaks natural power. The skill is letting action stay simple before force distorts it.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You push harder right when it was already working.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where did effort break the flow?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You add effort to prove control.
frictionSignals: forcing outcomes that were already moving
compensating when no compensation is needed

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body moves with power without tightening around it.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Is your body forcing, or is it already flowing?

unlockCondition.questKey: Notice the flow → follow the clean movement → stop adding force
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels efficient, light, and unstrained.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Act once, then stop adjusting unless reality asks for it.

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Power crashes until it learns direction.

questBrief.mission: Let failed action teach you how force needs to change.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Track where your energy created friction instead of movement.

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: Power here is experimental, unstable, and often too strong for its first target. It overshoots, misfires, collides, and learns through the result.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Mistakes are useful only when they change the next action. Repeating impact without correction turns power into damage.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You hit it the same way again even after it didn’t work.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you repeating the same push?

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body registers impact instead of rushing into another strike.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Did your body absorb the feedback, or skip straight to retrying?

unlockCondition.questKey: Act once → feel the result → change the next move
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body adapts instead of bracing against correction.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Name one thing that failed before you try again.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Force must evolve or it becomes damage.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: Let impact change the next action.

mainQuestContent.title: Relational Power

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Power shapes the field, not just your own movement.

questBrief.mission: Use your energy in relationship instead of carrying the whole system.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice where your force changes the people around you.
questBrief.livePrompt: Who is impacted by your energy?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line expresses power through relationship, support, and field impact. Your energy does not stay private; it changes what others expect, contribute, avoid, or rely on.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Unbalanced power turns into burden. Balanced power creates movement without making you the only engine.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You carry more because you can.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you over-supporting just because you have the strength?

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stays stable in relationship without taking over the whole field.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Are you grounded with others, or already carrying them?

unlockCondition.questKey: Offer energy → check the field’s response → reduce effort if no one meets you
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels balanced instead of loaded.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Pause and see who responds before giving more power.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Support must become shared to stay clean.

driftPattern: carrying imbalance because it is possible

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Others expect your strength before you choose to use it.

questBrief.mission: Separate true action from projected responsibility.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice who assumes you will step in.
questBrief.livePrompt: Where are you expected to carry?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: Your strength is visible here, so others may project responsibility, leadership, or rescue onto you before you have chosen to act.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Acting from projection burns clean power. The task is to choose action from truth, not from being cast in the role of the strong one.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You step in because they assume you will.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you performing strength for someone else's relief?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You prove power instead of using it.
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where approval starts driving action.

groundingProtocol: relax the back of the neck
groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body stays centered under expectation without rising into performance.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Are you acting from power, or performing power?

unlockCondition.questKey: Notice the expectation → choose the truthful action → refuse performance
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels grounded, deliberate, and unhooked from approval.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Delay response until the pressure to prove fades.

questBrief.mission: End action cleanly and return energy to rest.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Notice where movement has already completed.

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This line sees the full cycle of power: charge, action, completion, and withdrawal. The action is not complete until energy stops cleanly.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Continuous output drains power and blurs completion. Stopping is not weakness; it is part of clean force.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You keep going after it’s already done.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Where are you still pushing past completion?

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: You extend action past its purpose.
frictionSignals: not stopping when the cycle ends
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Watch where action refuses to end.

groundingEffect.somaticShift: The body exits action fully and returns to neutral.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Can your body stop completely without looking for the next move?

unlockCondition.questKey: Complete the action → stop fully → remove effort before beginning again
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: The body feels empty in a grounded way.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Mark the end before starting anything new.

perkTrees.subtitle: Develop the capacities behind Contained Power.

nodes.name: Directed Power
nodes.description: This path develops the ability to direct raw life force through contained power.
nodes.effect: Power becomes usable when it is contained, aimed, corrected, shared, chosen, and completed cleanly.
nodes.developmentCue: Notice whether energy is aligned or simply demanding release.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can use power without leaking it into impulse, performance, or overextension.

nodes.name: Surge Detection
nodes.description: You learn to recognize how power is moving before it becomes action.
nodes.effect: Energy patterns become visible before they turn into waste or impact.
nodes.developmentCue: Track the first signal of force in the body.
nodes.masteryMarker: You know whether energy wants containment, movement, correction, sharing, refusal, or rest.

nodes.name: Impulse Containment
nodes.description: The body learns to hold power without being ruled by the surge.
nodes.effect: Action becomes grounded instead of reactive.
nodes.developmentCue: Let the body stabilize before power leaves the system.
nodes.masteryMarker: You remain physically steady while force rises, moves, or stops.

nodes.name: Force Stabilization
nodes.description: Power becomes cleaner when it matches the field instead of overwhelming it.
nodes.effect: Your energy influences the environment without creating unnecessary strain.
nodes.developmentCue: Check whether the field is meeting, resisting, or relying on your force.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can affect the field without taking it over.

nodes.name: Precision Release
nodes.description: The full path matures into power that starts, acts, adjusts, and stops with precision.
nodes.effect: Life force becomes clean movement instead of pressure discharge.
nodes.developmentCue: Use only the force the moment can actually receive.
nodes.masteryMarker: Power is complete because it knows when to move and when to stop.
